  "findings": [
    "Differential pressure impulse lines are sloped incorrectly for the service type.",
    "Gas taps are located below the pipe centerline, risking liquid accumulation in the lines.",
    "Liquid taps are located on top of the pipe, risking gas pocket entrapment in the lines."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-route and re-slope the impulse lines according to the service type.",
    "Relocate gas taps to the top or upper 45 degrees of the pipe.",
    "Relocate liquid taps to the side or lower 45 degrees of the pipe."
  ],
  "rationale": "The DP impulse lines are installed upside down relative to standard practice for gas and liquid services. Gas taps must be on top to prevent liquid accumulation, and liquid taps must be on the side/bottom to prevent gas entrapment. This incorrect slope and orientation will cause measurement errors and process lag.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 551",
    "Manufacturer installation manuals"
  ]
}
